meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Setup to Solve Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate marketing workflows, helping students overcome lack of marketing skills in software development.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch a successful app. By leveraging Claude Code for automated content generation and Antigravity for rapid prototyping, you can transform technical code into high-converting marketing assets. This workflow bridges the gap between building a product and getting your first real users.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your codebase, but when the terminal shows 'Build Successful,' a cold silence follows. You have a functional product, but zero visibility. The gap between engineering brilliance and market adoption feels like a canyon, and without a marketing budget or a team, it’s easy to feel like your project is destined for the 'dead repo' graveyard.

But the rules of the game have changed. As a modern developer, you don't need to be a growth hacker; you just need to be a systems architect. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can programmatically generate landing pages, SEO-rich blog posts, and social copy directly from your source code. Let's turn your technical output into a marketing engine.

steps.title: Initialize the Marketing Context
steps.description: Establish a marketing persona within your project to ensure Claude understands your target audience before writing a single line of copy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase structure and identify the core value proposition for a non-technical user. Create a persona-based marketing brief.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a marketing_brief.md based on the current project requirements and target user persona.'

steps.title: Automate Landing Page Copy
steps.description: Extract your technical features and map them to user benefits using Claude's linguistic capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Convert the README features section into a high-converting landing page structure using a Problem-Agitation-Solution framework.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate landing page copy for index.html based on README.md features, focusing on user benefits.'

steps.title: Generate SEO-Optimized Metadata
steps.description: Ensure your project is discoverable by automating the creation of meta tags and search-friendly descriptions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate SEO-optimized meta titles and descriptions for all routes in the application, focusing on long-tail keywords for developers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Update all HTML meta tags with SEO-optimized content based on project keywords.'

steps.title: Create Social Media Launch Assets
steps.description: Turn your commit history into a narrative-driven launch announcement for platforms like X or LinkedIn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the last 5 commits and draft a 'Building in Public' thread that highlights the technical challenges solved.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Draft a 5-tweet thread for a launch announcement based on recent commit logs.'

steps.title: Establish an Automated Feedback Loop
steps.description: Set up a mechanism where user feedback is ingested into Claude to iterate on the product and marketing copy simultaneously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feedback-to-feature-improvement workflow that updates the marketing brief based on user input logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement a script that summarizes user feedback into actionable marketing improvements.'

pro_tips: Treat your marketing copy as code; version control it so you can A/B test different messaging iterations.
Use Claude Code to 'explain' your code to a 12-year-old; this is the best way to simplify your value proposition for landing pages.
Inject your commit history into Antigravity to generate 'Changelog' blog posts that build trust with early adopters.
Never ship a feature without asking Claude to generate the corresponding 'how-to' snippet for your documentation.
Use Claude to audit your landing page copy against your actual code to ensure you aren't over-promising features you haven't built.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, share your generated launch thread on social media, and start monitoring your analytics to see which features get the most engagement.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical and marketing toolkit to ship products that actually get used. Don't let the fear of 'marketing' stop you from launching your next big idea. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
